philosophy: Learn by Doing
從實作中學習
Students work with real devices, imperfect data, and practical constraints.
讓學生面對真實元件、不完美資料與實際限制。
Ask Why
持續追問為什麼
Mechanistic understanding matters more than following a procedure.
理解機制，比單純照著程序操作更重要。
Grow Independent
培養獨立研究
Students gradually learn to define questions, design experiments, and defend conclusions.
逐步學會定義問題、設計實驗並為結論負責。
Communicate Clearly
清楚溝通
Good research must be explained through writing, figures, presentations, and discussion.
好的研究必須能透過寫作、圖表、簡報與討論清楚表達。
Collaborate Globally
參與國際合作
Different disciplines and cultures strengthen both science and people.
不同專業與文化能同時提升研究與個人成長。
Create Impact
創造實際影響
Research should connect to clinical, industrial, or societal needs whenever possible.
研究應盡可能與臨床、產業或社會需求產生連結。
graduateTraining: Scientific writing, peer review, and presentation
Patent, technology transfer, and translational thinking
graduateTrainingZh: 資料分析與 AI 輔助建模
科學寫作、同儕審查與簡報
